creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #13)
> It seems /usr/bin/c++ either hangs or loops infinitely while building old
> versions of llvm:
> 
> http://gohan2.ysv.freebsd.org/data/head-amd64-default-baseline/
> p446433_s321376/logs/errors/llvm35-3.5.2_4.log
> http://gohan2.ysv.freebsd.org/data/head-amd64-default-baseline/
> p446433_s321376/logs/errors/llvm38-3.8.1_8.log
> http://gohan2.ysv.freebsd.org/data/head-amd64-default-baseline/
> p446433_s321376/logs/errors/llvm-cheri-3.8.d20160808_2.log

I can reproduce this, bisecting where this got introduced upstream, so I can file a bug there.
